narration_text: Tired of mistaking your thoughts for God’s voice? Try this three-step check. First, the Bible test — does the idea line up with Scripture and God’s character? Second, the peace and fruit test — does it bring calm conviction and produce godly fruit over time, or does it stir up anxiety and secrecy? Third, the community test — do trusted Christians confirm or challenge it? Pray, “Lord, lead me by truth and peace,” and then wait until Word, inner peace, and wise counsel all line up.
